name: run_id
description: Unique run identifier for the biomass BigQuery orchestration run.

name: started_at
description: UTC timestamp when the run started.

name: finished_at
description: UTC timestamp when the run finished.

name: status
description: Closed-set run status: running, succeeded, stage_only_succeeded, failed, validation_failed.

name: bq_input_project
description: Input BigQuery project read by miaproc biomass run-bigquery.

name: bq_input_dataset
description: Input BigQuery dataset read by miaproc biomass run-bigquery.

name: bq_input_table
description: Input forest-structure table read by miaproc biomass run-bigquery.

name: bq_output_project
description: Output project containing stage/final/control tables.

name: bq_output_dataset
description: Output dataset containing biomass stage/final tables.

name: bq_stage_table
description: Biomass stage table written with WRITE_TRUNCATE.

name: bq_final_table
description: Final biomass table merged into only when explicitly authorized.

name: merge_key_column
description: Merge identity column; default primary_key.

name: read_input_rows
description: Rows read from the source table.

name: stage_rows
description: Rows loaded into the stage table.

name: estimated_rows
description: Rows with non-null biomass_estimate.

name: skipped_rows
description: Rows preserved but not estimated.

name: dataset
description: Equation dataset filter used by the run; default dina.

name: equations_source
description: Packaged or user-supplied equation source.

name: merge_attempted
description: True only if final MERGE was attempted.

name: merge_authorized
description: True when allow_final_merge was explicitly authorized.

name: merge_inserted_rows
description: Inserted row count reported by BigQuery when available.

name: merge_updated_rows
description: Updated row count reported by BigQuery when available.

name: miaproc_version
description: miaproc package version recorded by the CLI when available.

name: bigquery_client_version
description: google-cloud-bigquery client version recorded when available.

name: error_text
description: Failure text for failed or validation_failed runs.
